title: The Young in Heart
director: Richard Wallace, Lewis Milestone, Gilbert Pratt
writer: Paul Osborn, I.A.R. Wylie, Charles Bennett
actors: Janet Gaynor, Douglas Fairbanks Jr., Roland Young
plot: Thrown out of the Riviera, a family of grifters meets a lonely, vulnerable rich old woman and insinuate themselves into her life while they sponge off her.
